title: cost_allocation_rule
description: A single cost-allocation rule extracted from a PUC docket, with a citation that resolves to a chunk in the retrieved set. Spec 0002 extends the v0 schema's source_citation to require chunk_id; see decisions/DEC-001 for the citation-faithfulness contract.

rule_id.description: Stable identifier for the rule within the extraction run.

rule_text.description: The rule statement, verbatim or close paraphrase.

line_range.description: 1-indexed `start-end` line numbers on the cited page.

chunk_id.description: Hex SHA-1 of the normalized chunk text (NFC + whitespace-collapse) joined with the page number. Must match a chunk_id from the retrieval call for this row; see DEC-001.
